TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn_kivecik, title = kivecik, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Paiwan]}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/wiki/kivecik} }

S.FORM: kivecik aicu a titjen a payuan kivecik a vavayan a pitalima.
S.PHON: kivəʦik aiʦu a tiʦən a pajuan kivəʦik a vavajan a pitaɭima.
S.FORM: kivecik aicu a titjen a payuan kivecik a vavayan a pitalima.
S.PHON: kivəʦik aiʦu a tiʦən a pajuan kivəʦik a vavajan a pitaɭima.
